title: Peek-a-Boo Colors with Sage
synopsis: Baby Sage discovers colorful objects hidden behind soft blankets in this gentle peek-a-boo adventure that introduces colors through repetitive, soothing text and warm illustrations.

illustration.description: Baby Sage, a smiling South Asian toddler with dark curly hair and bright brown eyes, sits on a soft cream-colored blanket reaching toward a red cloth covering something mysterious. His chubby hands are outstretched with excitement. The background is a gentle peachy pink with soft light filtering through.
illustration.alt: Baby Sage reaching for red cloth on blanket

illustration.description: Sage holds a bright red apple with both hands, his face lit up with joy and wonder. The red cloth is pulled away, revealing the shiny red apple. Warm golden light creates a cozy atmosphere around him as he sits cross-legged on the cream blanket.
illustration.alt: Sage holding red apple with delight

illustration.description: Sage crawls toward a soft blue blanket that covers another hidden object. His expression shows curious anticipation as he reaches one small hand toward the blue fabric. The setting remains cozy with pastel blue tones mixing with the warm cream background.

A round blue ball sits revealed as Sage claps his hands together in delight. The blue blanket is pulled aside, and the ball appears to bounce slightly off the soft surface. Sage's eyes follow the ball with wonder and his mouth forms a small 'o' of excitement.
illustration.alt: Blue ball revealed with Sage clapping

illustration.description: Sage sits with his hands covering his own eyes in a playful peek-a-boo gesture, while a sunny yellow blanket covers something nearby. His fingers are spread slightly so his bright eyes peek through. The background glows with warm yellow tones creating a cheerful atmosphere.
illustration.alt: Sage playing peek-a-boo with yellow blanket nearby

illustration.description: A bright yellow rubber duck is revealed as Sage removes his hands from his eyes with a big smile. His arms are spread wide in surprise and joy. The yellow blanket lies beside them, and soft golden light makes everything feel warm and inviting.
illustration.alt: Yellow duck revealed as Sage uncovers eyes

illustration.description: Sage lies on his tummy, propped up on his elbows, looking at a sage green cloth that covers the final mystery object. His expression shows gentle curiosity and anticipation. The background features soft green tones that complement his name and the peaceful setting.
illustration.alt: Sage on tummy looking at green cloth

illustration.description: Three soft green building blocks are revealed, and Sage sits reaching toward them with both hands. His face shows concentration and joy as he prepares to stack them. The green cloth is pulled away, and the blocks appear soft and safe for little hands to explore.
illustration.alt: Green blocks revealed with Sage reaching to stack them

illustration.description: Sage sits surrounded by all his colorful discoveries - the red apple, blue ball, yellow duck, and green blocks - with his arms raised up in celebration. His face beams with happiness and accomplishment. The diverse colored objects create a rainbow of gentle hues around him on the cream blanket.
illustration.alt: Sage celebrating surrounded by all colorful objects

metadata.illustrationStyle: Soft, rounded shapes with warm pastel colors. Gentle watercolor feel. Large, friendly faces. High contrast for baby eyes. Simple backgrounds.

questions.question: What color is Sage's apple?
questions.explanation: Sage found a red apple that goes 'crunch, crunch!'

questions.question: What sound does the yellow duck make?
What does Sage do with the green blocks?
questions.explanation: Sage stacks the green blocks - 'stack, stack!'
